steps.title: Find the publisher's stated reason
steps.content: The student claims the notes were included as a marketing device. Directly supporting this claim requires evidence showing the publishers' explicit purpose for including them—specifically, to attract readers.

steps.title: Match the evidence to the claim
steps.content: C explicitly states the publishers requested the notes “in order to make the book attractive to readers,” directly showing their marketing purpose. A, B, and D address textual changes, critical views, and revision development respectively, but none show why the publishers included the notes. That matches choice C — C is correct.
